title: LakehousePlumber Job Configuration
description: Schema for one YAML document of the orchestration job configuration file (config/job_config*.yaml) and the monitoring job configuration file (config/monitoring_job_config*.yaml). A document is either a project_defaults document (applies to ALL jobs), a job-specific document keyed by 'job_name' (string or list of job names), or a flat settings document (the whole document is treated as project defaults — the single-document legacy format, and the required format for monitoring job configs). Merge order: built-in defaults (max_concurrent_runs: 1, queue.enabled: true, performance_target: STANDARD) -> project_defaults -> job-specific. Nested mappings are deep-merged; lists are replaced. Unknown keys are rendered verbatim into the generated job YAML, so new Databricks Jobs API fields work without an LHP release.

ProjectDefaultsDocument.description: Project-wide defaults applied to every job unless overridden by a job-specific document

project_defaults.description: Settings applied to ALL jobs unless overridden by a job-specific document

job_name.description: Job name(s) this document configures. A list applies the same configuration to multiple jobs (each gets an independent deep copy).

oneOf.description: List of job names sharing this configuration

FlatSettingsDocument.description: Flat settings document: the whole document is treated as project defaults. This is the single-document legacy format and the required format for monitoring job configs (no project_defaults wrapper, no job_name key).

JobSettings.description: Job settings. Every value supports LHP substitution tokens (e.g. ${bundle_target}). Keys not listed here (git_source, parameters, environments, edit_mode, budget_policy_id, ...) are rendered verbatim into the generated job YAML.

max_concurrent_runs.description: Maximum number of concurrent runs of the job

queue.description: Job queue settings (default: enabled). When enabled, runs wait in queue once max_concurrent_runs is reached.

performance_target.description: Performance target for job execution: STANDARD (cost-effective) or PERFORMANCE_OPTIMIZED (faster startup, higher cost)

tags.description: Tags for cost tracking, organization, and monitoring. Deep-merged with inherited tags.

email_notifications.description: Email notifications for job lifecycle events

on_start.description: Email addresses notified when a run starts

on_success.description: Email addresses notified when a run succeeds

on_failure.description: Email addresses notified when a run fails

webhook_notifications.description: Webhook notifications for external integrations (entries reference notification destination IDs)

permissions.description: Job-level access control entries (level plus one identity: user_name, group_name, or service_principal_name)

user_name.description: User email this entry applies to

group_name.description: Group name this entry applies to

service_principal_name.description: Service principal application ID this entry applies to

trigger.description: Job trigger block (file_arrival, periodic, table_update, ...). Rendered verbatim into the generated job YAML.

continuous.description: Continuous job block (e.g. pause_status). Rendered verbatim into the generated job YAML.

run_as.description: Identity the job runs as (e.g. service_principal_name). Rendered verbatim into the generated job YAML.

git_source.description: Remote Git source for the job. Rendered verbatim into the generated job YAML.

health.description: Job health rules. Rendered verbatim into the generated job YAML.

notebook_cluster.description: Cluster overrides for the monitoring job's union notebook task (monitoring job configs only)

generate_master_job.description: LHP control knob: whether to generate the master orchestration job. Never emitted into the rendered job YAML.

master_job_name.description: LHP control knob: override the master orchestration job's name. Never emitted into the rendered job YAML.
